channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Former NFL player David Pollack asks for prayers after revealing wife will undergo surgery for brain cancer
item.description: Ex-NFL player David Pollack asked for prayers on social media this week after sharing that his wife, who was diagnosed with brain cancer, will undergo surgery on Wednesday.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: QB Daniel Jones agrees to a 1-year, $14 million deal with the Colts, AP source says
item.description: Former New York Giants quarterback Daniel Jones has agreed to a one-year, $14 million contract with the Indianapolis Colts, according to a person with knowledge of the deal.
item.dc:creator: Rob Maaddi, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Argentina puts 7 of Maradona’s healthcare professionals on trial
item.description: BUENOS AIRES (AP) — An Argentine court started on Tuesday its trial of seven healthcare professionals accused of negligence in the death of soccer great Diego Maradona, at age 60. Maradona was under the care of those professionals when he had a cardiac arrest in a house outside Buenos Aires on Nov.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Vikings focus up front in free agency by reaching deals with DT Jonathan Allen, G Will Fries
item.description: MINNEAPOLIS (AP) — The Minnesota Vikings continued an aggressive reconstruction of the interior lines on Tuesday by agreeing to terms on contracts with former Washington defensive tackle Jonathan Allen and former Indianapolis guard Will Fries, who followed center Ryan Kelly from the Colts to the Vik
item.dc:creator: DAVE CAMPBELL, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: PSG on brink of Champions League exit despite playing some of the best football in Europe
item.description: LIVERPOOL, England (AP) — Despite playing some of the best football, Paris Saint-Germain is once again on the brink of an early exit from Europe’s elite club competition.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Several once-highly ranked teams enter conference tournament week in need of wins to make NCAA field
item.description: LAWRENCE, Kan. (AP) — This was a time early in the season when Kansas seemed to be an insurmountable juggernaut, full of high-profile transfers such as Zeke Mayo and AJ Storr, All-American candidates such as Hunter Dickinson and veterans accustomed to winning. They were the preseason No.
item.dc:creator: DAVE SKRETTA, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Teams vying for No. 1 NCAA seeds stated their cases and now its up to selection committee to decide
item.description: UCLA, South Carolina, Texas and Southern California have all stated their cases for No. 1 seeds in the NCAA Tournament with their stellar play this season.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FEINBERG, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: The NBA's Southeast Division is struggling. There's still hope for the Hawks, Magic and Heat
item.description: This fall will mark the 10th anniversary of the NBA changing its playoff rules and not guaranteeing a division champion a top-four seed regardless of record. This season's Southeast Division is a good reason why that change was necessary.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Utah HC fights back, loses in shootout to Toronto
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - In the middle of a chase for an NHL playoff spot, the Utah Hockey Club needs every point it can get.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Josh Giddey scores season-high 29 points before injuring ankle and Bulls beat Pacers 121-103
item.description: Josh Giddey had a season-high 29 points along with 10 rebounds before leaving midway through the fourth quarter with a right ankle injury, and the Chicago Bulls won their third straight game, 121-103 over the Indiana Pacers on Monday night.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Ex-Yankees pitcher Schallock, who once replaced Mickey Mantle on roster, dies at 100
item.description: The Bay Area native went to Tamalpais High in Mill Valley then College of Marin before becoming the 10,823rd major league player when he debuted on July 16, 1951.
item.dc:creator: Janie McCauley, The Mercury News

item.title: Paige Bueckers and UConn are healthy and rolling as her final March Madness approaches
item.description: UNCASVILLE, Conn. (AP) — Paige Bueckers is in a class by herself in the Big East, becoming the first player to win the most outstanding player of the conference tournament three times.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FEINBERG, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Southwestern League basketball All-Conference teams announced
item.description: It was a wild season filled with buzzer-beaters and many other incredible moments, as we congratulate the great players honored on this year's Southwestern League All-Conference Teams.
item.dc:creator: Big Will Levenson, KREX 5

item.title: Jets and QB Justin Fields agree to a 2-year, $40 million deal, AP source says
item.description: Justin Fields was passed over by the New York Jets four years ago in the NFL draft. Now he's expected to be their No. 1 quarterback. Fields and the Jets agreed Monday to a two-year contract worth $40 million, a person with knowledge of the deal told The Associated Press.
item.dc:creator: DENNIS WASZAK Jr., Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Gerrit Cole will miss 2025 MLB season as Yankees announce ace will undergo Tommy John surgery
item.description: The New York Yankees' worst fears came true, as they announced Gerrit Cole will undergo Tommy John surgery on Tuesday to repair a torn UCL, rendering him out for the entire 2025 season.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Saunders earns first team All-Big 12 honors
item.description: PROVO, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - Fresh off leading No. 17 BYU to its eighth straight win on Saturday, Richie Saunders was named the Big 12 Most Improved Player and claimed First Team All-Big honors. Egor Demin earned honorable mention all-conference and all-freshman accolades.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Report: Bears sign DE Dayo Odeyingbo to 3-year deal
item.description: LAKE FOREST, Ill. — The Bears have signed defensive end Dayo Odeyingbo to a three-year deal, according to NFL insider Ian Rapoport. The 25-year-old was a second-round pick by the Colts in 2021 and addresses a need the team had on the defensive line.
item.dc:creator: Andy Koval, WGN 9

item.title: Rays owner facing pressure to sell team as MLB could pull revenue shares to force a sale: report
item.description: Tampa Bay Rays owner Stu Sternberg is reportedly facing increased pressure to sell the franchise amid concerns over a stadium deal.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: NFL Free Agency primer: Aaron Rodgers, Russell Wilson, Sam Darnold to make big decisions on next teams
item.description: The NFL's free agency negotiating window opens Monday at noon as several big players look to land their next contracts, including Aaron Rodgers and Joey Bosa.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Myles Garrett becomes the highest-paid non-quarterback in NFL history at $40 million per year
item.description: Myles Garrett is staying in Cleveland after the Browns gave him a record four-year contract extension that makes the four-time All-Pro edge rusher the highest-paid non-quarterback in NFL history.
item.dc:creator: ROB MAADDI, Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Oldest former MLB player, who once replaced Mickey Mantle on Yankees' roster, dies
item.description: Art Schallock got his shot in the major leagues after a struggling Mickey Mantle was optioned by New York in 1951.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Utes hire Alex Jensen as head basketball coach
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - Alex Jensen is coming home to Utah. Jensen was hired as the University of Utah's 17th head basketball coach Thursdaay, replacing Craig Smith, who was fired last month.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4
